Reported failure: only one cluster is connected and the user asks a generic
question. With the current production prompt the LLM has no way to know
the cluster name (cluster list is not in the prompt) so RequestClusterSelection
is the technically-correct answer; downstream code defaults to the single
connected cluster anyway. With the with_cluster_list variant the LLM does
see the single cluster and should answer with it directly, saving the
fallback round-trip.
